description: Style Note peter england takes care of the environment with these Oxygeans jeans. The brand have focused on saving water while creating these denims - without losing out on the style quotient. Take care of both your stylish look and mother nature. Product Details Dark blue jeans, has a washed look, low waist, buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch on the waist at the back, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right pocket, two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail and a crumpled look on the patch pockets Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately Do not bleach Drip dry  Warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit, Low waist The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32 Style NotePeter England takes care of the environment with these Oxygeans jeans. The brand have focused on saving water while creating these denims - without losing out on the style quotient.
